overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and transitions from open sidewalks to covered underpasses and narrow corridors. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed urban environments with heavy use of neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

crosses from the road onto the sidewalk

person in dark clothing crossing the street

multi-story building with large illuminated advertisements and neon trim
overhead road structure with support columns spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit city intersection at night, following a distinctive pink sports car as it drives across the wet asphalt. The camera crosses the road alongside pedestrians, with a large elevated highway visible overhead and bright neon advertisements illuminating the buildings on the right.

events.description: passing vibrant neon signs creating shifting colored reflections on wet pavement
approaching the covered area under the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing by closely

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with green neon lighting
large vertical screens displaying colorful advertisements
traffic light showing green walk symbol

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes rows of illuminated vending machines and large digital billboards. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant neon lights from the storefronts. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera approaches the shadow of the elevated highway ahead.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, where fluorescent lights replace the open neon sky. The camera walks alongside the road where vehicles pass by, approaching a pawnshop kiosk with green neon signage. Large concrete support pillars line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with intense red neon religious signage

events.description: enters narrow corridor with intense red neon lighting, leaving the main street
corridor becomes dominated by bright red neon cross symbols on the walls

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow covered corridor with intense red neon lighting, approaching an arched doorway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the main thoroughfare, the camera enters a narrow corridor bathed in intense red neon light. Bright pink neon crosses illuminate the right wall while a purple vending machine stands on the left. The corridor leads toward a distant arched opening, creating an enclosed, intimate atmosphere distinct from the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow urban corridor. It begins by tracking a pink sports car across wet asphalt beneath a massive elevated highway, moving alongside pedestrians amidst towering digital advertisements. As the camera advances along the commercial sidewalk, the open street gives way to the shadow of the highway, where the vibrant city lights shift into the sterile glow of fluorescent lamps and green neon pawnshop signage. The scene then transitions from the wide concrete walkway into a tight, enclosed passage bathed in intense red and purple light. Finally, the camera pushes past glowing neon crosses and a vending machine toward a distant arched opening, completing the shift from the expansive city center to an intimate, saturated alleyway.
